channel.title: ZSL's blog on ZSL
channel.description: Recent content in ZSL's blog on ZSL

item.title: Rician Fading
item.description: Methods of Rician fading generation founds on the internet.

item.title: Site Setup Log: No Static IP + Cloudflare Tunnel + DDNS-GO
item.description: My log of setting old PC as NAS.

item.title: Automatically Update Photo EXIF Information Based on Folder Names Using ExifTool
item.description: A script to modify EXIF information, mainly for photo albums downloaded from the internet.

item.title: About
item.description: Translate by Claude 3.5 sonnet Searching for information online is often a pain in the ass. You run into all sorts of crap: long-winded intros full of fluff, irrelevant memes, incorrect info, content scattered across different sites, pop-up ads, login walls, paywalls, slow loading times, spam sites, disabled right-clicks, and copy restrictions. Fed up with this nonsense, I decided to make my own blog as a personal knowledge base. The key feature of this blog is: No BS, Just the Good Stuff Of course, this mainly applies to technical articles. Besides that, there’ll be some random musings too. That’s pretty much the gist of it.
